sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation found in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Character Transformation
special_mechanics.description: Will can transform into two additional forms: Freedan (dark knight with combat-oriented abilities and longer reach) and Shadow (solid energy manifestation). Each character possesses unique abilities for accessing different areas.

special_mechanics.name: Form-Specific Abilities
special_mechanics.description: Will's techniques focus on accessing new areas with incidental combat applications. Freedan's techniques are more combat-oriented. Shadow has unique abilities unlocked through progression.

physics_values.shadow_unused_ramp_mechanic: sprites exist for Shadow launched from ramps
physics_values.shadow_unused_ledge_mechanic: sprites exist for Shadow sidling along narrow ledges

tier_notes: Tier 2 - No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. Sources contain gameplay mechanics, character abilities, and story information but lack detailed movement speed values, gravity constants, jump physics, or sub-pixel precision data. Combat focuses on melee attacks and character-specific damage values rather than movement mechanics.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Illusion of Gaia
